title: Floral Crisp Tunisian Anchovy Fillet Stir-fry
description: A show-off dish featuring crispy anchovy fillets caramelized in a floral sauce with herbs and spices for a kosher-friendly meal.
instructions: Slice aubergine and bell pepper into thin strips. Season both with salt.
Arrange on baking sheet lined with parchment paper, drizzle lightly with olive oil and sprinkle herbes de Provence over.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until tender and slightly browned.
Meanwhile, prepare anchovy fillets by rubbing them gently with minced garlic cloves and a pinch of salt. Toss in a bit of olive oil to prevent sticking.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add a few tablespoons of olive oil, then place anchovy fillets skin side down and cook for about 3-4 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from heat, add red wine vinegar to the pan, stir well to combine with garlic and cooking juices.
Add sliced vegetables to the same skillet. Stir-fry them together gently for another 5-7 minutes until they're just tender but still crisp.
Combine caramelized anchovy sauce with vegetables, garnish with fresh herbs if desired, serve hot as a main course.
